notes: This file is owned by Agent 15 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.
Agent 15 was stood up in wk28-assembler-spike as the owner of Kenney kit prefabs for buildings.

sprint_meta.notes: First real kitbashed prefab (peasant_house_small_v1) + gated Ursina loader (Agent 03) + playtest.

asks: Prefer Retro Fantasy walls/roofs; optional Nature Kit accent to exercise factor-only classifier path.
Hand-edit attribution if auto-inference is coarse; keep assets/ATTRIBUTION.md in sync.
Save, then reopen via --open peasant_house_small_v1 to confirm round-trip.
After Agent 03 lands the gated loader, confirm the prefab renders in-game with KINGDOM_URSINA_PREFAB_TEST=1.
Run python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick (must PASS) and update this log.

piece_picker_roots: assets/models/Models/GLB format (Retro Fantasy + Survival — textured path)
preflight_checks.schema_doc: assets/prefabs/schema.md v0.1 (from wk28) — fields aligned with PM acceptance.

suggested_piece_loadout_for_jaimie: Optional: Models/GLTF format/tree_pineSmallB.glb or flower_yellowC.glb (Nature Kit accent to exercise factor_lit_shader)
post_save_verification_plan: Read assets/prefabs/buildings/peasant_house_small_v1.json; assert building_type=='house', footprint_tiles==[1,1], ground_anchor_y==0.0, len(pieces)<=8.
Assert all pieces[].model paths resolve under assets/models/.
Assert attribution is non-empty and includes every pack referenced; update assets/ATTRIBUTION.md to list Kenney retro-fantasy-kit (and nature-kit if used) under used_for: 3D building prefabs.
Run python tools/qa_smoke.py --quick and record exit_code.
wk29_r1_execution.awaiting: Jaimie kitbash session in the Ursina assembler (interactive). Once saved, Agent 15 completes post-save verification and runs qa_smoke.

what_i_changed: assets/prefabs/buildings/peasant_house_small_v1.json — kitbashed by Jaimie in tools/model_assembler_kenney.py; 2 Retro Fantasy pieces (wall-door.glb at base, roof.glb lifted +1.0 on Y); saved and round-trip confirmed by reopening with --open.

assets/prefabs/buildings/peasant_house_small_v1.json — Agent 15 hand-trimmed attribution from ['kenney_retro-fantasy-kit','kenney_survival-kit'] (coarse auto-inference) down to ['kenney_retro-fantasy-kit'] only, since neither piece comes from the Survival kit.
assets/ATTRIBUTION.md — added 'Kenney Retro Fantasy Kit (3D models, CC0)' entry covering the 3D model use-case (existing Kenney entry only documented sprites).
how_to_test: python tools/model_assembler_kenney.py --open peasant_house_small_v1   # visual round-trip; confirmed by Jaimie

visual_review.notes: Saved prefab re-opened cleanly; roof sits on top of wall after Y-lift; round-trip visually identical to the authored state.

follow_ups_for_agent_12: Attribution auto-inference is coarse: any piece in Models/GLB format/ currently attributes BOTH kenney_retro-fantasy-kit AND kenney_survival-kit even when only one is used. Consider resolving pack-of-origin via the Kenny raw downloads tree (each raw pack has a per-pack GLB format subdir) so saved prefabs don't need post-save hand-trimming.
handoff_to_agent_03: Prefab ready at assets/prefabs/buildings/peasant_house_small_v1.json (building_type=house, footprint=[1,1], 2 Retro Fantasy pieces).
Loader must be gated strictly on os.environ.get('KINGDOM_URSINA_PREFAB_TEST') == '1' AND building type 'house' AND prefab file exists; otherwise existing Ursina render path is unchanged.

Apply the two-path shader classifier per piece (reuse tools.model_viewer_kenney._apply_gltf_color_and_shading). Both pieces in this prefab are textured (GLB format), so the textured/unlit path must render them with visible textures, not flat white.

sprint_meta.notes: Agent 15 is created this sprint. Role focus: prefab schema authorship + round-trip acceptance test of the assembler tool.
